data.content: The project uses **MSTest** as the test framework. Let me run the tests:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run dotnet test for MSTest project

arguments.description: Run dotnet test for MSTest project

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-30e6ec16f3b84afc910fcde7d6fc5bb3 && dotnet test --no-pager 2>&1", "description": "Run dotnet test for MSTest project", "initial_wait": 60}
